text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I should cut back on my meat intake...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I found a really tasty animal-based
protein drink recently.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And now my nutrient intake is all out of whack,
which is making my skin rough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So I need to eat more veggies to get my skin back
in shape and looking pretty.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh... not that I wanna be pretty or anything!
Haha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is rather worried about the condition
of her skin.
